VoiceHub Debug.commandLineArgs: -noexit -command "Import-Module '.\VoiceHub.dll' -Force; Write-Host 'VoiceHub module loaded. Try: Get-WindowsVoices -Detailed' -ForegroundColor Cyan"

VoiceHub Test Speech.commandLineArgs: -noexit -command "Import-Module '.\VoiceHub.dll' -Force; Out-WindowsVoice -Text 'デバッグテストです' -Voice 'Microsoft Haruka Desktop'"
